glosses.ro: a lua în considerare; a planifica
glosses.ja: 検討する; 計画する

translations.pt: Não estou pensando em me mudar.
translations.vi: Tôi không cân nhắc việc chuyển nhà.
translations.nl: Ik overweeg niet om te verhuizen.
translations.hi: मैं घर बदलने पर विचार नहीं कर रहा हूँ।
translations.sv: Jag funderar inte på att flytta.
translations.ro: Nu mă gândesc să mă mut.
translations.ja: 引っ越すことは考えていません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Verb 'envisager' (1st person singular present indicative) with elided negative clitic 'ne' (n’); forms part of the discontinuous negation with 'pas'.
Negative particle completing 'ne … pas' negation.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'envisager de'.

sentences.target: Tu envisages de changer de boulot.

translations.fr: Tu envisages de changer de boulot.
translations.es: Estás pensando en cambiar de trabajo.
translations.de: Du denkst darüber nach, den Job zu wechseln.
translations.pt: Você está pensando em mudar de emprego.
translations.vi: Bạn đang cân nhắc đổi công việc.
translations.nl: Je overweegt van baan te veranderen.
translations.hi: तुम नौकरी बदलने पर विचार कर रहे हो।
translations.id: Kamu sedang mempertimbangkan untuk mengganti pekerjaan.
translations.sv: Du funderar på att byta jobb.
translations.ro: Te gândești să îți schimbi locul de muncă.
translations.ja: 仕事を変えることを考えている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Verb 'envisager' conjugated (2nd person singular present indicative).
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb complement of 'envisager'.
Preposition required by the construction 'changer de [nom]'.
Common noun, object of the preposition in 'changer de boulot'.

sentences.target: On envisage un week-end à la mer.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃.vi.zaʒ œ̃ wi.kɛnd a la mɛʁ/

translations.fr: On envisage un week-end à la mer.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃.vi.zaʒ œ̃ wi.kɛnd a la mɛʁ/
translations.en: We’re thinking about a weekend at the seaside.
translations.es: Estamos pensando en un fin de semana en la playa.
translations.de: Wir denken über ein Wochenende am Meer nach.
translations.it: Stiamo pensando a un weekend al mare.
translations.ko: 우리는 바다로 주말 여행을 생각하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在考虑去海边过一个周末。
translations.yue: 我哋諗住去海邊過個週末。
translations.ru: Мы думаем о выходных на море.
translations.pt: Estamos pensando em um fim de semana na praia.
translations.he: אנחנו חושבים על סוף שבוע בים.
translations.tr: Deniz kenarında bir hafta sonu düşünüyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cân nhắc một cuối tuần ở biển.
translations.ar: نحن نفكّر في عطلة نهاية أسبوع على البحر.
translations.nl: We denken aan een weekend aan zee.
translations.uk: Ми думаємо про вихідні на морі.
translations.hi: हम समुद्र किनारे एक सप्ताहांत के बारे में सोच रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi vurderer en helg ved havet.
translations.id: Kami sedang mempertimbangkan akhir pekan di pantai.
translations.sv: Vi funderar på en helg vid havet.
translations.ro: Ne gândim la un weekend la mare.
translations.da: Vi overvejer en weekend ved havet.
translations.ja: 海辺で週末を過ごすことを考えている。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (often meaning 'we'); grammatically 3rd person singular.
Verb 'envisager' conjugated (3rd person singular present indicative).
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun.
Common noun (masculine) referring to a weekend.
Preposition indicating destination/location.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with 'mer'.
Common noun (feminine), object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Nous allons envisager de repeindre le salon.
sentences.reading: /nu zalɔ̃ ɑ̃.vi.za.ʒe də ʁə.pɛ̃dʁ lə sa.lɔ̃/

translations.fr: Nous allons envisager de repeindre le salon.
translations.ipa: /nu zalɔ̃ ɑ̃.vi.za.ʒe də ʁə.pɛ̃dʁ lə sa.lɔ̃/
translations.en: We’re going to consider repainting the living room.
translations.es: Vamos a considerar repintar la sala.
translations.de: Wir werden in Erwägung ziehen, das Wohnzimmer neu zu streichen.
translations.ko: 거실을 다시 칠하는 것을 고려할 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们打算考虑重新粉刷客厅。
translations.yue: 我哋會考慮將客廳重新油漆。
translations.pt: Nós vamos considerar repintar a sala de estar.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לשקול לצבוע מחדש את הסלון.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ cân nhắc sơn lại phòng khách.
translations.ar: سننظر في إعادة طلاء غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: We gaan overwegen om de woonkamer opnieuw te schilderen.
translations.hu: Meg fogjuk fontolni a nappali újrafestését.
translations.hi: हम बैठक कक्ष को फिर से रंगने पर विचार करेंगे।
translations.el: Θα εξετάσουμε το ενδεχόμενο να ξαναβάψουμε το σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Vi skal vurdere å male stuen på nytt.
translations.id: Kami akan mempertimbangkan untuk mengecat ulang ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Vi ska överväga att måla om vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Vom lua în considerare să revopsim sufrageria.
translations.da: Vi vil overveje at male stuen igen.
translations.ja: リビングを塗り直すことを検討する予定です。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Auxiliary 'aller' (1st person plural present) forming the futur proche with an infinitive.
Infinitive main verb complement of the auxiliary 'aller'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement of 'envisager'.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of 'envisager de'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'salon'.
Common noun (masculine), direct object of 'repeindre'.
